items.title: There's anti-aging hype. Then there's the science showing real promise

children.content: The fear of aging is driving a wave of biohacking businesses promising to help restore youth and fight disease. Four Corners investigates the race to reverse the aging process.

image.altText: a man wearing a red light helmet

items.title: Social media influencers Andrew, Tristan Tate arrested

image.altText: two men standing near each other

items.title: China wants more babies, so it's breaking up AI relationships

children.content: A boyfriend betrayed 17-year-old Xiaoxue, so she made an AI partner. But now the government is trying to end her relationship.

items.title: England wins crazy 10-goal thriller against France to claim third

children.content: England claims third place at the World Cup in a crazy game against France, which finishes 6-4 and sees Kylian Mbappe become, for now, the World Cup's greatest ever goalscorer.

articles.title: Messi received like royalty in New York ahead of World Cup final

children.content: Argentina's Lionel Messi has received rock star reception in New York City ahead of the World Cup final against Spain, but how much of a lasting impact will this tournament make in a crowded sporting market?

image.altText: Lionel Messi winks and gives a thumbs up as he sits on a stage

articles.title: How an Italian sculptor created the World Cup trophy that became an icon

children.content: It has become the most iconic trophy in world sport, and it all started in a small design studio in Milan more than 50 years ago.

items.title: Pauline Hanson delivers CPAC London speech to mostly empty seats

items.title: Hanson faces rough political seas beyond the Mediterranean

children.content: Many voters are unhappy with the hand they feel successive governments have dealt them and no-one has tapped into that better than Pauline Hanson.

items.title: The Aussie Leo who shares the same condition as Messi is rooting for Argentina

children.content: Lionel Messi was diagnosed with growth hormone deficiency, which is a rare condition, when he was younger. He has become a role model for young Leo Slattery from Brisbane.

items.title: Sara Albrecht took on Trump's tariffs. She got 'violent' calls

items.title: Even where the population isn't booming, houses are in short supply

children.content: Despite having the slowest growing population in the country, Tasmania is still battling rising homelessness and an ever-tightening rental market.

items.title: The Houdini of Boggo Road escaped the prison in 1946. He shouldn't have taken a friend

items.title: A US tech start-up wants to turn night into day. The question is why?

items.title: 'Lack of evidence' means Lao officials won't lay charges over teens' deaths

items.title: Eight killed, 60 wounded, as Ukraine attacks Russian warehouses
